samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding operations. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output representing the product of A and B. 8 15

Initialize

<implementation>Initialize product to 0.
always @(*) begin
    product = 16'b0; // Initialize product to 0
    temp = A; // Initialize temp to A
    for (i = 0; i < n; i = i + 1) begin
      if (B[i] == 1) begin
        product = product + temp; // Add shifted multiplicand
        temp = temp << 1; // Shift multiplicand left
      end
    temp = temp << 1; // Shift multiplicand left
    end
end

Initialize

<implementation>Initialize product to 0.
always @(*) begin
    product = 16'b0; // Initialize product to 0
    temp = A; // Initialize temp to A
    for (i = 0; i < n; i = i + 1) begin
      if (B[i] == 1) begin
        product = product + temp; // Add shifted multiplicand
        temp = temp << 1; // Shift multiplicand left
      end
    temp = temp << 1; // Shift multiplicand left
    end
end
